# Gorgon.js

> A lightweight (~4kb) TypeScript caching library for async functions. Works in Node.js and browsers with automatic concurrency protection.

Gorgon deduplicates simultaneous requests for the same cache key — if 10 callers request the same key at once, the async function runs only once and all callers share the result. Errors are never cached; the next request retries fresh.

## Installation

- npm: `npm install @gorgonjs/gorgon`
- pnpm: `pnpm add @gorgonjs/gorgon`
- yarn: `yarn add @gorgonjs/gorgon`

## Full Documentation

For a complete, self-contained reference with all API details, code examples, TypeScript types, and integration guides, see [llms-full.txt](https://gorgonjs.dev/llms-full.txt).

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/getting-started): Quick start guide
- [Simplified Overview](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/simplified): One-page overview of the library

### Core API

- [get](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/usage/get): `Gorgon.get(key, asyncFunc, policy?)` — fetch from cache or execute and cache
- [put](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/usage/put): `Gorgon.put(key, value, policy?)` — insert directly into cache
- [clear](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/usage/clear): `Gorgon.clear(key)` — clear a key, supports wildcards (`user/*`)
- [overwrite](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/usage/overwrite): `Gorgon.overwrite(key, asyncFunc, policy?)` — force-refresh a key
- [settings](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/usage/settings): `Gorgon.settings(opts?)` — configure debug, defaultProvider, retry timeout
- [addProvider](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/usage/addprovider): `Gorgon.addProvider(name, provider)` — register a storage backend
- [Policies](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/usage/policies): Expiry as milliseconds, Date, false (forever), or {expiry, provider}

### Concepts

- [Concurrency](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/concurrency): Automatic request deduplication with configurable retry threshold
- [Error Handling](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/error-handling): Errors propagate to all waiters but are never cached
- [Retry](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/retry): Configurable timeout for stuck requests (default: 5s)
- [Query Collocation](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/collocation): Pattern for keeping fetch logic close to components
- [Hooks](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/hooks): Listen to cache lifecycle events (get, put, clear, etc.)
- [Custom Storage](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/custom-storage): Implement IGorgonCacheProvider for Redis, IndexedDB, etc.

### Integrations

- [React](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/ui/react): useGorgon hook with loading/error/refetch
- [File Provider](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/providers/file): `@gorgonjs/file-provider` — persist cache to disk
- [ClearLink](https://gorgonjs.dev/docs/plugins/clearlink): `@gorgonjs/clearlink` — sync cache clearing across servers via WebSocket

## Optional Packages

- `@gorgonjs/react` — React hooks for Gorgon
- `@gorgonjs/file-provider` — File-based cache provider for server-side persistence
- `@gorgonjs/clearlink` — WebSocket-based cross-instance cache invalidation

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/mikevalstar/gorgon)
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@gorgonjs/gorgon)
